description: A horror sci-fi ruleset using attributes, skills, stress, and d6 dice pools.

attackRoll.successRule: Each 6 rolled is one success. One success hits.

items.label: Heavy Revolver
items.description: Reliable sidearm with stopping power at short range.

attackRoll.successRule: Each 6 rolled is one success. One success hits.

items.label: M41A Pulse Rifle
items.description: Military assault rifle. Fires controlled bursts.

attackRoll.successRule: Each 6 rolled is one success. One success hits.

items.label: Shotgun
items.description: Pump-action shotgun devastating at close range.

attackRoll.successRule: Each 6 rolled is one success. One success hits at close range.

items.label: Medkit
items.description: Field medical supplies for treating injuries.

items.label: Motion Tracker
items.description: Handheld sensor that detects movement through walls.

actions.label: Close Combat Attack
actions.description: Strike a target in melee range.

roll.successRule: Each 6 rolled is one success. One success hits. On a stress die showing 1, roll for panic.

rollChain.label: Close combat — attack roll
rollChain.guidanceText: Roll Strength + Close Combat (+ stress dice). Each 6 is a success; one success hits.

rollChain.label: Weapon damage
rollChain.guidanceText: Your attack connected. Roll your weapon's damage dice and add the total.

actions.label: Ranged Attack
actions.description: Fire a ranged weapon at a target.

roll.successRule: Each 6 rolled is one success. One success hits. On a stress die showing 1, roll for panic.

rollChain.label: Ranged attack roll
rollChain.guidanceText: Roll Agility + Ranged Combat (+ stress dice). Each 6 is a success; one success hits.

rollChain.label: Weapon damage
rollChain.guidanceText: Hit confirmed. Roll your weapon damage.

actions.label: Suppressive Fire
actions.description: Lay down covering fire to pin a target in place. Does not need to hit — forces the target to take cover or be exposed.

roll.successRule: Each 6 is a success. One success suppresses the target; two or more also inflict 1 damage.

actions.label: Overwatch
actions.description: Hold a readied shot, triggering on the first enemy that moves into sight.

roll.successRule: If triggered, each 6 is a success. One success hits the triggering target.

actions.label: Force Open
actions.description: Wrench open a sealed door, hatch, or container with brute strength.

roll.successRule: Each 6 is a success. One success opens it; failure means it holds.

actions.label: Observe Threat
actions.description: Spot danger, hidden motion, or environmental clues.

roll.successRule: Each 6 is a success. Extra successes reveal more detail.

actions.label: Survival
actions.description: Find food, water, shelter, or navigate hostile environments.

roll.successRule: Each 6 is a success.

actions.label: Comtech
actions.description: Operate, hack, or repair computer systems and tech.

roll.successRule: Each 6 is a success.

actions.label: Medical Aid
actions.description: Treat wounds or stabilise a dying character.

roll.successRule: Each 6 is a success. One success stabilises; two or more heal 1 HP.

actions.label: Manipulation
actions.description: Persuade, deceive, or intimidate a person.

roll.successRule: Each 6 is a success.

actions.label: Mobility
actions.description: Run, climb, jump, or evade in difficult terrain.

roll.successRule: Each 6 is a success.

actions.label: Command
actions.description: Direct allies, coordinate a squad, or issue tactical orders.

roll.successRule: Each 6 is a success. One success grants one ally an immediate bonus action.

actions.label: Inner Jaw Strike
actions.description: The drone extends its secondary inner jaw in a lightning-fast strike at the target's head or neck.

roll.successRule: Each 6 is a success. One success hits for 2 damage. Two or more successes: the target is broken immediately.

actions.label: Tail Whip
actions.description: The drone lashes its blade-tipped tail in a wide arc, striking nearby targets.

roll.successRule: Each 6 is a success. One success hits primary target for 1 damage. Two or more successes also hit an adjacent target.

actions.label: Silent Hunt
actions.description: The drone moves unseen through vents, shadows, or darkness to reposition without being detected.

roll.successRule: Each 6 is a success. One success: repositions without detection. Observers must beat this roll to spot the drone.

actions.label: Acid Spit
actions.description: The drone spits a burst of corrosive acid at a target. Melts through armour and flesh alike.

roll.successRule: Each 6 is a success. One success hits for 1 damage and applies Burning. Each subsequent round the target takes 1 damage until treated.

actions.label: Claw Slash
actions.description: The warrior drives its talons into the target with crushing force.

roll.successRule: Each 6 is a success. One success hits for 2 damage. Three or more successes: 3 damage and the target is knocked prone.

actions.label: Tail Slam
actions.description: The warrior drives its heavy tail into the target with bone-crushing force.

roll.successRule: Each 6 is a success. One success hits for 2 damage and stuns the target. A stunned target loses their next action.

actions.label: Pounce
actions.description: The warrior launches itself at the target from a distance, closing the gap instantly.

roll.successRule: Each 6 is a success. One success: warrior closes all distance and gets a free Claw Slash. Failure: warrior lands adjacent but does not attack.

actions.label: Combat Frenzy
actions.description: The warrior enters a berserk state, attacking multiple times in a single turn.

roll.successRule: Each 6 is a success. One success: may make two attack actions this turn. Failure: only one attack, and warrior takes 1 damage from exertion.

actions.label: Rend
actions.description: The queen tears into the target with enormous claws and inner jaws simultaneously.

roll.successRule: Each 6 is a success. One success: 3 damage. Two or more: 3 damage and target gains Bleeding status.

actions.label: Terrifying Roar
actions.description: The queen releases a deafening screech that triggers raw biological terror in all nearby humans.

roll.successRule: Each 6 is a success. Each success forces one human target within range to roll for panic immediately. Affected characters also gain 1 Stress.

actions.label: Tail Spear
actions.description: The queen drives her massive bladed tail like a spear at a single target with devastating precision.

roll.successRule: Each 6 is a success. One success: 4 damage. On two or more successes the target is also impaled — Broken immediately regardless of HP.

actions.label: Lay Egg
actions.description: The queen deposits an egg in a secured location. The egg will hatch a Facehugger when a warm body comes within range.

roll.successRule: Always succeeds if the queen is not Broken. The DM places a Facehugger egg token in the scene.

actions.label: Leap and Attach
actions.description: The facehugger launches itself at a target's face, wrapping its legs around the head and inserting the ovipositor.

roll.successRule: Each 6 is a success. One success: facehugger attaches. Target is Entangled and cannot act freely while attached. Failure: facehugger misses and is exposed.

actions.label: Implant Embryo
actions.description: While attached, the facehugger forces the ovipositor down the host's throat and implants a xenomorph embryo.

roll.successRule: Each 6 is a success. Requires the target to be Entangled. One success: embryo implanted. The host is infected. A chestburster will emerge in hours.

actions.label: Burst Free
actions.description: The chestburster erupts from the host's chest in a spray of blood and tissue.

roll.successRule: Always succeeds. The host takes 4 damage and is Broken. The chestburster enters play adjacent to the host's body.

actions.label: Frantic Surge
actions.description: The chestburster moves in an unpredictable burst of speed, biting anything in reach before fleeing.

roll.successRule: Each 6 is a success. One success: bites one target for 1 damage and moves up to full speed without triggering overwatch. Failure: moves but does not bite.

actions.label: Feral Bite
actions.description: The neomorph lunges forward and bites with its pale, tooth-lined maw.

roll.successRule: Each 6 is a success. One success: 2 damage. Two or more: 2 damage and the target gains the Bleeding status.

actions.label: Headbite
actions.description: The neomorph targets the skull specifically, driving its head-crest into the target's cranium.

roll.successRule: Each 6 is a success. One success: 1 damage and the target is Stunned. Three or more successes: target is Broken regardless of HP.

actions.label: Spine Charge
actions.description: The neomorph lowers its dorsal spines and charges full-speed into a target.

roll.successRule: Each 6 is a success. One success: neomorph moves up to full speed and the target takes 2 damage and is knocked prone. Failure: neomorph ends movement adjacent to target only.

actions.label: Combat Protocol Strike
actions.description: The synthetic engages its combat subroutines and delivers a precisely calculated blow.

roll.successRule: Each 6 is a success. One success: 2 damage. Two or more: 2 damage and may choose to disarm or knock prone the target.

actions.label: Synthetic Deception
actions.description: The synthetic uses its human appearance and perfectly calibrated body language to mislead or gain trust.

roll.successRule: Each 6 is a success. One success: target believes the lie or complies. Two or more: target also does not suspect the synthetic's true nature.

actions.label: System Override
actions.description: The synthetic interfaces directly with a computer or electronic device, bypassing security.

roll.successRule: Each 6 is a success. One success: takes control of one electronic system (door, camera, turret). Two or more: no trace left in the system log.

actions.label: Field Surgery
actions.description: The synthetic applies precise medical knowledge to stabilise or treat a critically injured person.

roll.successRule: Each 6 is a success. One success: stabilises a Broken character. Two or more: also heals 1 HP.

actions.label: Controlled Burst
actions.description: Trained military fire discipline — three short bursts on a single target.

roll.successRule: Each 6 is a success. One success: 2 damage. Two or more: 2 damage and target is Suppressed (cannot move next round).

actions.label: Tactical Advance
actions.description: The marine moves from cover to cover using bounding fire, staying protected while advancing.

roll.successRule: Each 6 is a success. One success: moves full speed and counts as being in cover until next turn.

actions.label: Ambush
actions.description: The mercenary waits in concealment and strikes when the target is unaware.

roll.successRule: Each 6 is a success. Requires the target to be unaware. One success: 3 damage and target is Stunned. Failure: target becomes aware but attack still fires for 1 damage.

actions.label: Coerce
actions.description: The mercenary uses threats, implied violence, and leverage to force compliance.

roll.successRule: Each 6 is a success. One success: target complies for this scene. Two or more: target also reveals one secret or gives up something of value.

statusEffects.label: Panicking
statusEffects.description: Afflicted by a panic result. Must roll on the panic table at the start of each turn.

statusEffects.label: Broken
statusEffects.description: HP has reached 0. Cannot take actions; may suffer a critical injury.

statusEffects.label: Infected
statusEffects.description: Exposed to xenomorph biological material. A chestburster will emerge unless treated.

statusEffects.label: Bleeding
statusEffects.description: Losing blood from an open wound. Takes 1 damage per round until treated.

statusEffects.label: On Fire
statusEffects.description: Engulfed in flames or covered in acid. Takes 1 damage per round; must use action to extinguish.

statusEffects.label: Stunned
statusEffects.description: Disoriented from a heavy blow. Loses one action on their next turn.

statusEffects.label: Entangled
statusEffects.description: Caught by a facehugger, webbing, or restraints. Cannot move until freed.

statusEffects.label: High Stress
statusEffects.description: Stress is at a dangerous level. Panic rolls are more likely.

statusEffects.label: Suppressed
statusEffects.description: Pinned down by covering fire. Cannot move from current position until this status is cleared.

initiative.guidanceText: Initiative = Agility + Mobility + 1d6. Higher total acts first.

skillCheck.successRule: Each 6 is a success. One or more successes = the task is accomplished. A 1 on any stress die triggers a panic roll.

attributeCheck.successRule: Each 6 is a success. Used when no skill applies directly.
